results.title: We Audited Our Agent Tool-Call Traces. Half Our Eval Data Was Garbage. - DEV Community
results.text:
We Audited Our Agent Tool-Call Traces. Half Our Eval Data Was Garbage. - DEV Community

TL;DR: We pulled 41,000 production agent traces at Nexus Labs to build a fine-tuning dataset. After a manual audit of 1,200 of them, ~48% were unusable: tool calls that "succeeded" but returned wrong data, retries masking provider failures, and silent fallbacks that changed which model answered. results.title: LLM-as-judge variance broke our DPO training signal for 3 weeks - DEV Community
results.text:
LLM-as-judge variance broke our DPO training signal for 3 weeks - DEV Community

TL;DR: Our DPO pipeline used a single LLM as the preference judge. Training reward climbed every run. Production accuracy fell 4 points. The judge was flipping its own labels 28% of the time at temperature 0.
